meta.title: Sound Sanctuary
meta.description: Sound healing, contemplative practices, and grounded sessions to support calm and nervous system regulation.

hero.title: Sound Healing
hero.alt: Sound healing session outdoors — Raphael playing instruments and a person lying down receiving sound
hero.sub: Regulation practice for modern life: rhythm, rest, and integration.

taster.title: Try a Free Sound Healing Session
taster.description: A sound healing session is the perfect way to relax from home whenever you need immediate relief. It's a chance to reconnect with your inner world without having to travel anywhere.

virtual.title: Does It Work Virtually?
virtual.p1: Yes. A virtual sound healing session is a powerful way to pause and reset from home. All you need is headphones, a comfortable place to lie down, and the willingness to close your eyes and listen.
virtual.p2: The sound entrains your brainwaves into a relaxed, restorative state. It's a way to access the benefits of deep meditation without any experience required — whenever you need it.
virtual.alt: Person lying down with headphones receiving an online sound healing session

benefits.title: Benefits
benefits.sub: What a sound healing session can offer you.

workplace.title: Workplace Sessions
workplace.sub: Sound healing for teams and organisations.
workplace.body: Bring sound healing into your workplace. Tailored group sessions designed to reduce stress, improve focus, and support team wellbeing.

training.title: Practitioner Training
training.sub: Learn the art of sound healing.
training.body: Interested in becoming a sound healing practitioner? Training programmes and mentorship available for those called to this path.

forWhom.label: Who It Is For
forWhom.title: When life runs hot
forWhom.cta_prompt: Ready to downshift? Two paths. Same intention.

whatItIs.label: Upstream Care
whatItIs.title: What is a Sound Bath?
whatItIs.sub: Sound Healing uses resonance, rhythm, and guided rest to help the nervous system downshift without performance.
whatItIs.p1: It is simple: you arrive, you settle, sound creates a field, and your body has room to integrate. Nothing to achieve.
whatItIs.p2: The promise is not medical treatment. It is training capacity: downshifting, returning to rhythm, and leaving with more space inside.
whatItIs.alt: Sound bath session in nature with gong and singing bowls

whyItWorks.label: Sound and the Nervous System
whyItWorks.title: Why it works
whyItWorks.p1: The human body is 70% water. Sound travels through water.
whyItWorks.p2: The nervous system is immersed in that water.
whyItWorks.p3: When the bowl strikes, vibration meets the fluid, propagates as a wave, and reaches every nerve from within.
whyItWorks.sun_body: The frequency of fire. Heat that dissolves.
whyItWorks.moon_body: Internal water frequency and the subtle body's rhythm.
whyItWorks.ocean_body: Undulation that cleanses and opens energy centers.
whyItWorks.forest_body: Root. Grounding. Low sound that anchors to earth.

practitioner.label: About
practitioner.title: Raphael
practitioner.p1: I came to sound through music and meditation—discovering how rhythm, resonance and silence can soften stress and invite genuine rest.
practitioner.p2: Sessions are slow and structured: clear openings and closings, guided downshifting, sound immersion and space for integration—so regulation can happen without effort.

formats.label: Session Formats
formats.title: Choose depth
formats.oneOnOne_body: Personalized support for transitions, sleep stress, and chronic overstimulation.
formats.group_body: A shared field for settling and connection. Low barrier and high felt sense.

live.label: Live
live.title: Sound Healing Live
live.sub: A weekly ritual to keep your nervous system tended. Join for a reset and return for rhythm.
live.body: Low commitment. High return. Show up, lie down, let sound do the work.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Book a 1:1
contact.sub: Three questions. I reply within 48 hours.

footer.ctaText: Two paths, same intention: rhythm, regulation, integration.

portfolioPreview.title: Portfolio
portfolioPreview.sub: Selected sessions, events, retreats, and collaborations.

testimonialsPreview.title: Words
testimonialsPreview.sub: Short reflections from sessions and collaborations.

tasterModal.title: Receive Your Free Session
tasterModal.description: Enter your details below and we'll send you a link to a free recorded sound healing session.

tasterModal.alreadySubscribed: You already have access! Check your inbox.
tasterModal.errorFallback: Something went wrong. Please try again.

meta.title: About
meta.description: Learn about the sound healing and contemplative approach behind Sound Sanctuary sessions.

aboutPage.label: About
aboutPage.title: About
aboutPage.sub: My work brings together sound healing, music, and contemplative practice to create a calm and supportive space. Each session is paced gently, with care for how your body feels in the moment, so rest and regulation can happen naturally.
aboutPage.approachBody: Rhythm, resonance, and silence are used intentionally to help the nervous system settle.
aboutPage.sessionsBody: Each session is paced slowly with clear openings and closings so integration feels natural.

meta.title: Contact
meta.description: Book a 1:1 sound healing session or ask a question. Three questions. Reply within 48 hours.

contactPage.label: Contact
contactPage.title: Book a 1:1
contactPage.sub: Three questions. I reply within 48 hours.
contactPage.inquiryBody: Tell me what support you are seeking, your preferred timing, and if this is 1:1 or group context.
contactPage.nextBody: I send next steps with format and scheduling options, with the minimum friction needed to start.

meta.title: Portfolio
meta.description: Sessions, events, retreats, and collaborations — proof and context from Sound Sanctuary.

portfolioPage.label: Portfolio
portfolioPage.title: Portfolio
portfolioPage.emptyDescription: Sessions, events, and retreats — coming soon.

meta.title: Sessions
meta.description: 1:1 Sound Therapy and Group Sound Journey — formats, durations, and how to book.

sessionsPage.label: Sessions
sessionsPage.title: Choose your depth
sessionsPage.sub: Availability and timezone details appear in booking flow, not in global navigation.
sessionsPage.decisionSub: Glow on hover, gentle response on click. Each button is a synapse.
sessionsPage.oneOnOneBody: Peter Hess bowls on the body. Sound meets water.
sessionsPage.groupBody: Collective rest and connection without performance.
sessionsPage.timelineArrivalBody: Settle. Breathe. Let the body arrive.
sessionsPage.timelineImmersionBody: The sound field forms. The body responds.
sessionsPage.timelineIntegrationBody: Guided silence. The nervous system processes.
sessionsPage.timelineClosingBody: Gradual return. Tea. Leave with more space.
sessionsPage.faq0a: No. Sessions are accessible to anyone. There is no technique to learn.
sessionsPage.faq1a: Comfortable clothes. You'll be lying down or seated most of the time.
sessionsPage.faq2a: Great. The body knows what it needs. Sleeping during a session is integration.
sessionsPage.faq3a: 1:1 sessions can be adapted. Photosensitive epilepsy or metal implants — tell me beforehand.

meta.title: Sound Healing
meta.description: How sound travels through the nervous system. The practice behind Sound Sanctuary sessions.

soundHealingPage.label: Sound Healing
soundHealingPage.title: Sound as liquid light
soundHealingPage.sub: The sound of the bowls moves through the nervous system the way sap moves through a leaf’s veins—finding pathways and restoring connection.
soundHealingPage.principleBody: Rhythm, resonance, and structured stillness create conditions where the system can settle and integrate.
soundHealingPage.waterP1: The human body is 70% water. Sound travels through water.
soundHealingPage.waterP2: The nervous system is immersed in that water.
soundHealingPage.waterP3: When the bowl strikes, vibration meets the fluid, propagates as a wave, and reaches every nerve from within.
soundHealingPage.ctaPrompt: Want to feel this in your body?

meta.title: Newsletter
meta.description: Quiet updates on session availability and reflective notes on sound and regulation.

newsletterPage.label: Newsletter
newsletterPage.title: Quiet updates
newsletterPage.sub: Quiet updates on session availability and reflective notes on sound and regulation.
newsletterPage.sectionReceiveBody: Quiet updates on session availability, new formats, and reflective notes on sound and regulation.
newsletterPage.sectionRhythmBody: Sent occasionally—no spam. Expect a short note when there’s something genuinely useful to share.

meta.title: Privacy
meta.description: Privacy notice for Sound Sanctuary website visitors and newsletter subscribers.

privacyPage.label: Privacy
privacyPage.title: Privacy
privacyPage.sub: A short, practical notice about what is collected and why. No hidden tracking and no data resale.
privacyPage.collectBody: Your email address if you subscribe to the newsletter. If you contact us, you may also share your name and message content.
privacyPage.useBody: Sending newsletter updates and replying to session inquiries. We do not sell your personal data.
privacyPage.removeBody: Every newsletter email includes an unsubscribe link. You can also email us requesting removal.
privacyPage.cookiesBody: We do not use advertising or tracking cookies. If anything changes in the future, this page will be updated.
